name: Shopify
description: Manage products, orders, and customers via the Shopify Admin REST API.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: Interact with the Shopify Admin REST API to manage products, orders, customers, collections, and inventory.

X-Shopify-Access-Token.description: Shopify Admin API access token (Environment variable: SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN)

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: Retrieve a list of products from the Shopify store.

limit.desc: Maximum number of results to return (1-250).

status.desc: Filter by product status: active, archived, or draft.

fields.desc: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Retrieve a single product by its ID.

product_id.desc: The unique ID of the product.

fields.desc: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

tools.name: create_product
tools.description: Create a new product in the Shopify store.

product.desc: Product object. Required field: title. Optional: body_html, vendor, product_type, variants (array), images (array).

tools.name: update_product
tools.description: Update an existing product by its ID.

product_id.desc: The unique ID of the product to update.

product.desc: Product object containing the fields to update (e.g. title, body_html, status).

tools.name: list_orders
tools.description: Retrieve a list of orders from the Shopify store.

status.desc: Filter orders by status: open, closed, cancelled, or any.

limit.desc: Maximum number of results to return.

financial_status.desc: Filter by financial status (paid, pending, refunded, etc.).

fulfillment_status.desc: Filter by fulfillment status (shipped, unshipped, partial, etc.).

fields.desc: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

tools.name: get_order
tools.description: Retrieve a single order by its ID.

order_id.desc: The unique ID of the order.

tools.name: list_customers
tools.description: Retrieve a list of customers from the Shopify store.

limit.desc: Maximum number of results to return.

fields.desc: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

created_at_min.desc: Show customers created after this date (ISO 8601 format).

tools.name: get_customer
tools.description: Retrieve a single customer by their ID.

customer_id.desc: The unique ID of the customer.

tools.name: list_collections
tools.description: Retrieve a list of custom collections from the Shopify store.

limit.desc: Maximum number of results to return.

fields.desc: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

tools.name: get_inventory_levels
tools.description: Retrieve inventory levels for one or more inventory items.

inventory_item_ids.desc: Comma-separated list of inventory item IDs (required).

location_ids.desc: Comma-separated list of location IDs to filter by.

limit.desc: Maximum number of results to return.
